case_title: MICHEL, ARCELIA VS ZEPEDA, ISIDRO ORELLANA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $700.00 FILED BY MICHEL, ARCELIA AS TO DEFENDANT ZEPEDA, ISIDRO ORELLANA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-26-1996 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
